data.title: Nauticus Robotics Announces 1-for-8 Reverse Stock Split
data.description: Houston-based Nauticus Robotics, Inc. (NASDAQ: KITT) revealed plans for a 1-for-8 reverse stock split of its common stock. This strategic move, known as the "Reverse Split," will consolidate the company's outstanding shares. This decision comes after gaining approval from its stakeholders.

data.title: TruLife Distribution Will Attend Soho Healthfest
data.description: This week, a Health and Wellness Brand Management and Marketing Agency is set to participate in an event in Rockwall, Texas. The agency, known as TruLife Distribution, is based in FORT LAUDERDALE, Fla. The company has been expanding its reach coast-to-coast in 2026, operating from its East Coast offices.

data.title: Fusion Announces Compassion in Care Scholarship Winners for 2026-2027 School Year
data.description: In Omaha, Nebraska, on April 17, 2026, Fusion, a local healthcare company, announced the selection of recipients for the Compassion in Care Scholarship program for the upcoming academic year of 2026-2027. This scholarship is intended to support students who are seeking careers in nursing or therapy. The chosen recipients for this year...

data.title: iQIYI Deepens Its Presence at BIFF With AI Agent Nadou Pro and a New Film Screening
data.description: Yesterday, in Beijing, iQIYI, the top online entertainment platform in China, marked the commencement of the 16th Beijing International Film Festival (BIFF) by incorporating AI production features into its traditional offerings. This move signifies a significant expansion for iQIYI at BIFF.

data.title: Marengo Reports Late-Breaking Initial Phase 2 Clinical Results from Invikafusp Alfa Plus TRODELVY® and Unveils Partnered Novel IPN01203/STAR0501 STAR Program in Phase 1 at AACR 2026
data.description: Phase 2 clinical trials have shown promising results with confirmed complete responses in advanced metastatic breast cancer patients who had received extensive prior treatments. These responses were observed in both the triple-negative breast cancer (TNBC) and hormone receptor-positive/human epidermal growth factor receptor 2 negative (HR+/HER2-) subtypes. This marks the public unveiling of the advanced clinical stage Ipsen-partnered STAR program IPN01203, with data revealed in Cambridge, Massachusetts on April 17, 2026.

data.title: PARKE BANCORP, INC. ANNOUNCES FIRST QUARTER 2026 EARNINGS
data.description: In Q1 2026, the net income stood at $11.8 million, showing a 6.9% increase from Q4 2025. The earnings per share (diluted) for Q1 2026 were $0.99, up from $0.93 in Q4 2025. Return on average assets (ROAA) was at 2.19% for Q1 2026, an improvement from 2.04% in Q4 2025. Return on average equity (ROAE) also saw a rise to 14.47% in Q1 2026 from 13.69% in Q4 2025. Net interest margin (NIM) was reported at 4.17% for Q1 2026 compared to...

data.title: American Bitcoin Schedules First Quarter 2026 Earnings and Conference Call
data.description: American Bitcoin Corp, trading as ABTC on Nasdaq, disclosed their plan to report financial performance for the Q1 of 2026. The company specializes in Bitcoin accumulation and aims to develop the Bitcoin infrastructure in the United States. The announcement was made on April 17, 2026 in Miami.

data.title: Caris Precision Oncology Alliance Welcomes UCSF Helen Diller Family Comprehensive Cancer Center
data.description: Caris Life Sciences®, a notable patient-focused AI TechBio business and pioneer in precision medicine, revealed on April 17, 2026, that the UCSF Helen Diller Family Comprehensive Cancer Center has become part of the Caris Precision network. Caris Life Sciences® (NASDAQ: CAI) leads in utilizing next-generation AI technology and innovative approaches in medicine. This partnership signifies a significant step in enhancing precision medicine efforts.

data.title: HBCU Scholars Shine as North Carolina Central University Captures Its First Honda Campus All-Star Challenge National Championship
data.description: Academic teams from 65 Historically Black Colleges and Universities (HBCUs) recently faced off in the 37th annual Honda Campus All-Star Challenge. Hampton University, Fisk University, and Spelman College emerged as the top competitors, securing the top four positions. Honda's dedication to promoting academic excellence among HBCUs was evident throughout the event, which took place in TORRANCE, Calif. on April 17th. This challenge is part of Honda's ongoing efforts to support and uplift these institutions, showcasing the talent and intellectual acumen present within the HBCU community.

data.title: Forum Board Reinitiates Share Repurchase Program; Forms Special Committee of Independent Directors to Evaluate Proposals to Maximize Shareholder Value
data.description: In Palm Beach, Florida on April 17, 2026, Forum Markets, Incorporated (Nasdaq: FRMM) revealed plans to enhance value by tokenizing real-world assets. The digital asset platform aims to revolutionize capital markets. The Board has approved a series of measures to achieve this goal.
